channel.title: Angular on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Angular on Arrans github.io

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
item.description: A community-supported supercharged version of paperless: scan, index and archive all your physical documents

item.title: Chocobozzz/PeerTube
item.description: ActivityPub-federated video streaming platform using P2P directly in your web browser

item.title: codesandbox/codesandbox-client
item.description: An online IDE for rapid web development
